notes: Self-described controlled experiment with three specification-varying cases generating code via a multi-module LLM pipeline (tool-build), then evaluated by 13 human experts via an online questionnaire (human_subjects) and by 5 LLM evaluators against fixed OWASP/inclusivity rubrics (benchmark-style scoring). Grounded in a single healthcare user story (case-study flavor). Small sample (n=13); a preprint, not peer-reviewed.
